competitors.published_source: No comparable published retrieval@10 benchmark — reference only, not reproduced. Live measurement is opt-in via --competitors agentmemory.
No comparable published retrieval@10 benchmark — reference only, not reproduced. Live measurement is opt-in via --competitors supermemory.
No comparable published retrieval@10 benchmark — reference only, not reproduced. Live measurement is opt-in via --competitors claude-mem (harness-mem /v1/search compatible endpoint).
Mem0 LoCoMo / marketing claims — reference only, no reproduced number recorded here.
LongMemEval paper claim (96.6%) — general-lifelog domain, reference only, domain mismatch with developer-workflow.

fairness_rules: Default reproduced target is harness-mem only. All other competitors are published (reference-only) by default.
Do not mix published numbers with locally reproduced numbers in ranking tables. They are rendered in separate tables/columns.
External competitors (agentmemory / supermemory / claude-mem) can be live-measured opt-in by passing them to --competitors; only then are they treated as reproduced.
Use the same query set and scorer for all reproduced adapters.
Mark unavailable competitors as skipped or published(reference-only), not as zero score.
Record embedding model, token budget, and strict_project per run in reproducibility.md.
harness-mem seeds and retrieves its own fixtures, so high scores prove the runner works end-to-end, not external superiority.
